title: Multi-Platform Plugin Design
summary: Technical design for replacing the Claude-only SpecGraph plugin with thin, structurally-equivalent plugins across Cursor, OpenCode, Codex, and Claude that consume shared MCP-delivered workflow content.
notes: Filename/path is docs/plans/ (design doc), not spec/ or adr/. Status: Draft (not an accepted decision). Content is heavily architectural/implementation-contract (delivery flow, resource schemas, content boundary tables, error handling, security) which outweighs prose/tutorial signals typical of DOC, so classified SPEC over DOC. No user-story/acceptance-criteria language, ruling out PRD; no single locked Decision/Consequences structure, ruling out ADR.
